stdout:
Table	Create Table
financial_events	CREATE TABLE `financial_events` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `tipo` enum('saida_vale','saida_pagamento','saida_he','saida_vr','saida_vt','saida_encargos','entrada_desconto','ajuste') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `categoria` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'folha_pagamento',
  `subcategoria` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `mesCompetencia` varchar(7) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `dataPrevista` date NOT NULL,
  `dataEfetiva` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `valor` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('previsto','consolidado','pago','cancelado') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'previsto',
  `employeeId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `employeeName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `obraId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `obraNome` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `descricao` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `origemTipo` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `origemId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `criadoPor` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `atualizadoPor` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `fe_company_mes` (`companyId`,`mesCompetencia`),
  KEY `fe_tipo` (`tipo`),
  KEY `fe_status` (`status`),
  KEY `fe_data_prevista` (`dataPrevista`),
  KEY `fe_employee` (`employeeId`),
  KEY `fe_obra` (`obraId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
